Chase Dimond's Famous "Back‐In‐Stock" Hack
MARK COMPLETE 	← PREVIOUS TOPIC 	NEXT TOPIC →
CHASE DIMOND’S FAMOUS “BACK-IN-STOCK” HACK
Topic Progress:
In this lesson, I'll teach you about the Back in Stock flow. This flow allows your
customers to raise their hand and say, "I want this product" and get notified when it
becomes available.
Here's how it works:
Back in Stock Email Flow
Trigger: Subscribed to "Back in Stock"
Time: Wait 5 minutes
Email: "While you wait, here's what you should check out."
Trigger: Item Back in Stock
Email: "Wait is over!" Offer with or without discount code; CTA: Claim your product!
Time: Wait 2 days
Email: Reminder
ACTION ITEM
Draft and send your Back in Stock emails. Don't forget to set your time intervals!
TOOLS & RESOURCES
Back in Stock Email: How to Win Customers Away from Competitors, Sumo
Back in Stock Email Examples, Pinterest
